headline: Ticketure Acquires PatronManager to Unify Best in Breed Ticketing and CRM
summary: Ticketure is pleased to announce its acquisition of the PatronManager business. This acquisition unites Ticketure, the leading provider of modern admissions technology for visitor attractions with PatronManager, the premier Salesforce-native CRM for the arts and culture sector. This strategic union creates a purpose-driven powerhouse dedicated to providing comprehensive technology solutions to ticketing centric organizations.

This strategic union creates a purpose-driven powerhouse dedicated to providing comprehensive technology solutions to ticketing centric organizations.

headline: Salesforce Pushes Deeper Into Enterprise AI Control With Agent Fabric Upgrade
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) has expanded its Agent Fabric offering with a new centralized control plane for managing AI across multiple vendors. The update adds automated discovery of external AI models, workflow mapping tools, and granular governance features for large language models. These changes focus on improving security, visibility, and interoperability for enterprises using AI in core business systems. Salesforce shares recently closed at $186.27, with the stock up 7.8% over the past...

headline: The Ungoverned Workforce: Cybersecurity Insiders Finds 92% Lack Visibility Into AI Identities
summary: WASHINGTON, April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Cybersecurity Insiders, in collaboration with Saviynt, has released new research indicating that AI identities are increasingly operating within core enterprise systems, often without established governance or visibility. The study finds that while 71% of CISOs and senior security leaders confirm AI tools have access to core systems such as Salesforce and SAP, only 16% report that this access is governed effectively. headline: A Look At Salesforce (CRM) Valuation As Big Investors Back Its AI Platform And Software Rebound
summary: Salesforce (CRM) is back in focus after fresh signals that big investors and market technicians are leaning toward software, with Bridgewater and others pointing to its Agentforce and broader AI platform as key long-term drivers. See our latest analysis for Salesforce. Those headlines around Agentforce traction and large investors leaning back into software come after a tougher stretch, with a 90 day share price return of 15.36% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of 20.57% decline...
